title: Lqcolombo
compiled_truth: Lqcolombo is an external contact at [AOL](companies/aol). Over the corpus period (2000-06-30 to 2002-01-10), Lqcolombo sent 3 and received 125 emails, totalling 128 interactions. Top correspondents: [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (3).
